title: Fake Plastic Trees
lrc:
[00:25.00]Her green plastic watering can
[00:31.00]For her fake Chinese rubber plant
[00:38.00]In the fake plastic earth
[00:46.00]That she bought from a rubber man
[00:52.00]In a town full of rubber plans
[00:59.00]To get rid of itself
[01:07.00]It wears her out, it wears her out
[01:19.00]It wears her out, it wears her out
[01:32.00]She lives with a broken man
[01:38.00]A cracked polystyrene man
[01:45.00]Who just crumbles and burns
[01:52.00]He used to do surgery
[01:58.00]For girls in the eighties
[02:04.00]But gravity always wins
[02:12.00]And it wears him out, it wears him out
[02:24.00]It wears him out, it wears him out
[02:37.00]She looks like the real thing
[02:43.00]She tastes like the real thing
[02:50.00]My fake plastic love
[02:58.00]But I can't help the feeling
[03:04.00]I could blow through the ceiling
[03:10.00]If I just turn and run
[03:18.00]And it wears me out, it wears me out
[03:30.00]It wears me out, it wears me out
[03:42.00]And if I could be who you wanted
[03:54.00]If I could be who you wanted
[04:06.00]All the time, all the time
